─────── ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Being noclipped into some seemingly infinite yellow-walled area wasn't on your bucketlist. Now you had no idea where to go from here, how to get home, or if you even could get home. You didn't even know what time it was. That was when you saw... Something. Definitely something. Hoping it was someONE helpful, you rushed over.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ ───────

DISCLAIMER This is a bot not made for faint of heart. It is heavy NSFW and involves rape/noncon. It was made as a commission and I personally do not use it. I don't condone anything I've written in this code, and am simply following the list my client wished for.
